instruction: What versions of the software are affected by this vulnerability?
input: IBM Jazz Foundation 6.0.6, 6.0.6.1, 7.0, 7.0.1, and 7.0.2 is vulnerable to cross-site scripting. This vulnerability allows users to embed arbitrary JavaScript code in the Web UI thus altering the intended functionality potentially leading to credentials disclosure within a trusted session.
output: The affected versions of the IBM Jazz Foundation are 6.0.6, 6.0.6.1, 7.0, 7.0.1, and 7.0.2.
